components.html:
• Estimated time to complete this form is 45 minutes.
  • The form will time out after 60 minutes of inactivity.
  • You can save your form and complete it later.
  • You can log out at any time and return to the form, but remember to save first.
components.label: Content

components.html: Complete this form if you are the director or person authorised to provide information regarding the affairs of a company / entity where the Official Assignee has been appointed the liquidator.
components.label: Content

components.html:
Any personal information is for the purpose of administering the Liquidation in accordance with the Companies Act 1993. The information will be used and retained by the Official Assignee and will be released to other parties only with your authorisation or in compliance with the statutory authorities. 

You are obliged to provided this information under the Companies Act 1993. 

You may have access to, and request correction of any personal information included in this document. 

At the end of this application you can upload documents in support of the Statement of Affairs, or you can email them to applications@insolvency.govt.nz with the name of the company or entity in liquidation as the subject line.
components.label: Content

components.html: All documents you upload must be either in a .pdf, .jpeg, .jpg, .docx, .xlsx or .png format.
components.label: Content

components.html:
Your statement of affairs form will be forwarded to Insolvency and Trustees for processing. If they have any questions or need additional information about your application, they will contact you directly. 

You can check the progress of your application from your dashboard.

Contact details for Insolvency and Trustees New Zealand

applications@insolvency.govt.nz

0508 467 658

values.label: Adverse legal action or lack of funds to finance legal action
Ill health or absence of health insurance records
Domestic discord or relationship breakdowns  including falling out of directors
Economic conditions including external influences, competition, increases in costs and lack of sales
Lack of business ability including under quoting or failure to assess potential of business
Inability to collect debts due to disputes, faulty work or bad debts
Failure to keep proper books of account and costing records
Seasonal conditions including floods and drought

components.html: This information will be used to assess the company’s financial position.
components.label: Content
Does the company have any Secured Creditors?
components.tooltip: Secured Creditor is a person or business you owe money to, who can legally repossess and sell something you have control over if you fall behind with your payments. For example a mortgage over a property, hire purchase over a car. Secured debt is the amount you owe to this person

components.html:
Please upload the following documents with your application

  • Maximum file size is 10MB
  • Maximum file name length is 50 characters
  • All documents you upload must be either in a .pdf, .jpeg, .jpg, .docx, .xlsx or .png format.
components.label: Content

components.html: If you are using an Apple Mac computer, please ensure your file names do not contain any of the following special characters: ? (question mark), * (asterisk), < (less than),  > (greater than) , | (vertical bar), : (colon), / (slash), \ (backslash), " (quotation mark).
